name: Chocolate Cherry Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine chocolate wafer crumbs and melted butter. Press firmly into a 9-inch springform pan, covering the bottom and 2 1/2 inches up the sides. Chill.
2. Preheat oven to 325 degrees F. Combine chocolate chips and heavy cream over hot (not boiling) water in a large bowl. Stir until morsels are melted and mixture is smooth. Set aside.
3. In another large bowl, beat cream cheese and sugar until creamy. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. Add the chocolate mixture, cherry liqueur, and vanilla to the cream cheese mixture. Mix until blended.
5. Pour into prepared crust.
6. Bake in the preheated oven at 325 degrees F for 60 minutes.
7. Turn off the oven and leave the door ajar. Let stand in the oven with the door open for 1 hour.
8. Remove from the oven and let cool completely.
9. Chill for 24 hours.
10. Spread cherry pie filling over the top of the cheesecake, leaving a 1-inch border around the edge. Decorate the edge with whipped cream if desired.
